flags: our damage is 4/5 magical — one enemy magic-resist item blunts most of it

notes: Their main damage was Legion (36k physical); 1/5 of you itemized armor — that hurt.
Enemy ran 3/5 on or near their meta core.

draftNote: 3 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane), Goldilocks324 (jungle→midlane), Xeebs (carry→jungle).

coaching.headline: Three lanes were yours, but a string of bad trades fed Legion and Sparrow until the map was gone.
coaching.team: You won the draft — carry, offlane and jungle all read favored — and threw it in the fights, not the picks. These were full 5v5s the enemy just won: the 14-min fight (1-3), the 15-min Fangtooth (2-3), the 18.5 wipe at their Mini Prime (0-5), and the 23-min River wipe (0-5). Only one of you built armor into Legion. Towers ended 1 to their 9. The rule: stop walking the full team into their carries on their side, and after the 18.5 wipe reset and defend rather than re-engage at 23.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Repeated full-team losses into a fed Legion and Sparrow — the 0-5 wipe at their Mini Prime (18.5) and the 0-5 at their River (23) — with only 1 of 5 itemizing armor against 36k physical.

perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Mourn died 6 times into a comp where you and Wraith were getting collapsed on every fight. You were dragged into the 18.5 Mini Prime wipe and the 23-min River wipe — both 0-5 losses. As the frontline, your job there was to be the one calling the disengage, not to be first in. When the team can't win a fight, the support stops it.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Crunch was the favored jungler and you had the early lead, but you carried no armor into a 4-physical comp and Legion (36k) punished it every fight. Your 6 deaths came in the forced team fights (14, 18.5). The build fix is real here — armor was missing core — but the bigger one is not committing the whole squad into their carries on their half.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Shinbi was favored into Adele and you barely got to play the lane — 1 kill, and you were absent from the early skirmishes that decided tempo, only appearing for the 17.5 and 18.5 fights, both losses. Get on the map earlier with the lead you were handed; arriving only for the lost team fights wastes a winning matchup.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Wraith had the favored lane but your damage (4/5 of the team) was magical into a comp where one magic-resist item blunts most of it — that's the comp flag, and it showed. Your Vanquisher didn't come online until 36 min; you were under-tuned for the fights that mattered (14, 18.5, 23). Push for objectives you can actually take instead of walking the full team into Legion's side, where these 5v5s kept going his way.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Zinx was the unfavored lane into Sparrow and it was theirs all game — but your CS held up. The problem was team-wide: you got pulled into the 14, 18.5 and 23-min wipes. With your lane already behind, your value is poke and zone, not committing into a fed Legion in the open.

threats: Heal-stacking: Narbash, Adele. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
Enemy is 4/5 physical — a single armor item blunts most of their damage; itemize armor on anyone diveable.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Mourn Abduct (pull), Crunch Right Crunch (knockup 1.25s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Mourn) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Your damage is 4/5 magical — predictable; one magic-resist item answers most of it. Mix in a physical threat.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Abduct pull → Contagion ally-heal bugs → Beguile damage-reduction → Eclipse vision-denial ult
ourKits.winCondition: pull a target in and sustain the team through the brawl
ourKits.playWith: burst that punishes his pulled target
ourKits.playAgainst: respect the long Abduct channel/range; anti-heal blunts Contagion

ourKits.combo: Forward Crunch gap-close stun → Right Crunch knockup → empowered Left Crunch, sustain via Re-Crunch
ourKits.winCondition: all-in a squishy with the empowered combo and heal back through Re-Crunch
ourKits.passive: post-ability empowered basic that refunds cooldowns
ourKits.playWith: peel-stripping engage so he reaches the backline
ourKits.playAgainst: peel/CC him off — without resets he's stranded; anti-heal blunts Re-Crunch

ourKits.combo: Rushing Beat dashes → Line Tempo wolves → Circle Rhythm shield → All-Kill! wolfpack ult
ourKits.winCondition: stack Track and unleash All-Kill! in a grouped fight
ourKits.playAgainst: spread vs the wolfpack; she's squishy without her shield up

ourKits.combo: Peekaboo! mark+slow → Knock, Knock! sniper → Back It Up! displacement ult
ourKits.winCondition: land long-range snipes on marked targets and reset on takedowns
ourKits.playWith: engage that holds a target in his sniper line
ourKits.playAgainst: close the gap — he's weak point-blank; dodge the skillshot snipe

ourKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
ourKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
ourKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
ourKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

enemyKits.combo: Thunk stun → March! speed → Song heal aura → Crash Bang Boom! AoE slow ult
enemyKits.winCondition: engage with Thunk and group-buff the team through fights
enemyKits.playWith: a dive team that rides his speed and heal
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge/cleanse Thunk; he's low-damage — kill his carry through the aura

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

enemyKits.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
enemyKits.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
enemyKits.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API
